skills.name: ingest
skills.description: Ingest source files into the vault: read, prompt the LLM, create/update wiki pages, commit.

skills.name: query
skills.description: Answer questions using hybrid search (vector + keyword + RRF fusion) with cited sources.

skills.name: maintain
skills.description: Dream cycle: lint, stale detection, embedding coverage, and auto-fix.

skills.name: review
skills.description: Review recently ingested content for quality, accuracy, and completeness.

skills.name: learn
skills.description: View, search, and manage the self-learning journal.
